div.p: Engineers: Follow these transitions for the failure detector implementation.

ul.li: onSuspect(inc): If inc >= n transition to SUSPECT

div.p: Transition: Stays in Dead state for DeadTTL to ensure gossip propagation before removal.

ol.li: Indirect Probe: If A fails, ask $k$ nodes to ping A.
Suspicion: If all fail, mark A as SUSPECT.
Refutation: A can prove it is ALIVE by increasing incarnation.

div.p: Incarnation Win Rule: A node can only refute suspicion by broadcasting a higher incarnation number.
Trigger: DirectProbe timeout AND k IndirectProbes fail Guard: new_msg.inc >= current.inc Action:
Trigger: Received ALIVE broadcast for self Guard: msg.inc > current.inc (Refutation) Action:
Trigger: timer.OnExpire() Guard: No refutation received within T Action:
Cannot jump from ALIVE to DEAD without refutation window (SUSPECT).
